markdown_full:
# Rakesh Kumar Pathak

+91 8884330001 | rakesh.pathak8886@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/rakesh-pathak-15179a2a1/
Bengaluru, Karnataka – India

## Profile Summery

Senior Project Manager with 10+ years of experience delivering Integrated Security, ELV/ICT, and Command & Control Center solutions for enterprise and critical infrastructure clients. Proven expertise in ELV solution architecture consistently delivering ELV projects on time and within budget.

## Skills

**Tools:** Auto CAD | ACC | Revit | MS Project | Zoho Projects & CRM | Click Up
**Domain Expertise:** Command & Control Centers | Physical Security | VMS | Video Analytics | Cyber Security
**Project Management:** Risk Management | Budgeting & Cost Estimation | BOQ & Procurement | Vendor Management | Cost Control | Stakeholder Management | Governance & Compliance.

## Work Experience

**IIRIS Consulting, Bangalore** **January 2025 - Present**
**Sr. Manager – Security Design**
* Led end‑to‑end project and program management for large, multidisciplinary security engagements, achieving 95–100% on‑time delivery while maintaining budgets within ±5% variance.
* Managed cross‑functional consulting and delivery teams for Access Control, CCTV, Video Analytics, Physical Security, and Integrated Security Systems, improving delivery efficiency by 20–25% through standardized execution frameworks.
* Conducted enterprise‑level Security Risk Assessments and threat analyses, enabling clients to reduce identified high‑risk vulnerabilities by 30–40% through targeted mitigation strategies.
* Translated complex business and operational requirements into scalable security architectures, reducing design rework and change requests by 25%.
* Coordinated with vendors, integrators, and clients across the full project lifecycle, accelerating procurement and deployment timelines by 15–20%.
* Working as a key liaison between technical teams and senior leadership, improving stakeholder alignment and reducing escalation cycles by 30%.
* Standardized processes, governance models, documentation, and reporting, delivering 20–30% improvement in operational consistency and scalability across engagements.
* Supported business development and solution positioning, contributing to 10–15% revenue uplift in repeat engagements through improved delivery quality and client satisfaction.

**Krupa Communications, Bangalore** **August 2018 - January 2025**
**Project Manager**
* Directed end-to-end delivery of 20+ ELV/IBMS turnkey projects (Access Control, CCTV, Fire Alarm), achieving a 95%+ on-time completion rate and 100% functional sign-off.
* Optimized BOQ tracking and material procurement, delivering 10–12% budget savings, while reducing billing closure time by 30% through streamlined PO and invoicing workflows.
* Reduced schedule overruns by 15–20% and site idle time by 18% by strengthening resource planning, material logistics, and site clearances.
* Collaborated with architects and MEP consultants to evaluate Design Change Requests (DCRs), limiting rework to under 3% and maintaining zero major audit non-conformities.
* Supervised cross-functional site teams of 15–30 engineers and technicians, driving a 20% productivity increase and a 15% improvement in quality scores through targeted technical training.
* Managed end-to-end project documentation, including shop/as-built drawings, MIS dashboards, DPRs, and complete HOTO (Handover/Takeover) documentation for seamless client closeouts.
* Proactively resolved on-site technical snags and defects, reducing unplanned downtime by 20% and boosting client retention by 25%+ through reliable, communicative project management

**Anjaneya Innovation Pvt Ltd, Bangalore** **August 2017 - July 2018**
**Network Engineer**
* Engineered and deployed core network infrastructure, including the installation and configuration of Fortinet and Sophos Firewalls, Routers, Access Points, and Endpoint Security solutions.
* Implemented advanced security policies and VPN tunnels using FortiGate and Sophos XG/XGS series to ensure robust perimeter defense and secure remote access.
* Executed routine system maintenance and hardware lifecycle management for Fortinet and Sophos ecosystems to maintain high availability and optimal performance.
* Utilized vendor-specific diagnostic tools Forti Analyzer and Sophos Central to troubleshoot and resolve complex hardware, software, and connectivity issues.
* Collaborated with Project Managers to deliver large-scale installations.

---

**Thattva Innovations Pvt Ltd, Bangalore**  June 2015 - July 2017
*Field Engineer*
* Performed RF testing and validation of Docomo 3G and GSM wireless dongles.
* Achieved 95% Turnaround Time (TAT) within SLA, ensuring timely issue resolution.
* Delivered high-quality testing outcomes, resulting in 98% positive client feedback
* Documented test results, issue reports, and corrective actions

## Project Work
* **IPR Nigeria – Integrated Campus Security (2026):** Led the complete design and implementation of an integrated surveillance ecosystem for a 5,000‑acre industrial campus. Directed architecture of a centralized Command & Control Center with AI‑enabled CCTV, thermal imaging, and intelligent analytics. Delivered a scalable security model improving situational awareness and incident response.
* **Bharat Petroleum (BPCL) – National‑Level Risk Assessment (2026):** Managed multi‑phase threat and vulnerability assessments across 20+ critical energy installations (refineries, LPG plants, storage sites). Developed mitigation plans aligned with MHA and Homeland Security guidelines. Strengthened security posture, compliance, and resilience for vital national assets.
* **Zepto HQ – Enterprise Security Operations Center (SOC) Deployment (2025–2026):** Oversaw end‑to‑end design and delivery of Zepto’s centralized SOC and Command Center. Produced DPR, RFP, BOQ, and led vendor onboarding. Implemented ISO‑aligned SOPs and trained operators. Integrated 1,500+ stores with AI detection and SOS systems, reducing response times and improving operational control. Achieved first go‑live within 90 days from concept design to delivery.
* **Exide Energy – Greenfield Security Master Planning (2024–2025):** Directed security architecture for a 160‑acre greenfield giga‑factory including risk and mitigation, AI‑based surveillance, access control, and anti‑drone detection compliant with Drone Rules 2021. Optimized design to deliver 30% cost savings against client budget while ensuring future‑ready security infrastructure.
* **Lafarge Africa Plc – Fleet Management Command Center (2025):** Led the design and deployment of a centralized fleet command center for 3,500+ trucks. Integrated GPS tracking, geo‑fencing, driver behavior analysis, speed monitoring, and route optimization dashboards. Enhanced fleet safety, operational visibility, and logistics efficiency.
* **SATS Food Solutions – ELV Systems Execution (2023–2024):** Managed full ELV systems implementation (Fire Alarm, IBMS, PAVA) for one of Asia’s largest frozen food storage facilities. Coordinated with PMC (Vestian Global) to ensure on‑time, budget‑compliant.

## Achievements
* Achieved promotion to Senior Manager in 6 months after delivering key projects on schedule and reducing project costs by 20%.
* Delivered a Command & Control Center go live in 90 days (fastest in the organization), integrating 1,500+ sites, Impact: 40% faster incident detection, 25–35% reduction in response times
* Successfully implemented a CRM platform for project delivery, Impact: 100% portfolio visibility, 20–25% improvement in project tracking accuracy, 15–20% reduction in management reporting effort.
* Delivered management dashboards and KPI frameworks, enabling data driven leadership decisions, improved forecasting accuracy, and stronger accountability across delivery teams.

## Awards and Certificates
* Value catalyst of the year award (IIRIS) - 2025
* **Google Cloud Certification:** Certified Google Cloud platform (GCP).
* Ravel Certified commissioning Engineer.
* Pursuing the Project Management Professional (PMP)®

## Education
**Punjab Technical University – Jalandhar Punjab**  July 2011 - May 2015
B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering

**A.N. College, (BSEB) - Patna**  June 2009 - April 2011
10+2 Intermediate - Science

**Raj High School, (BSEB) - Patna**  April 2008 - May 2009
